articles.title: Cops tracking two suspects in Shah Alam car theft
articles.summary: SHAH ALAM: Police are actively tracking down two men believed to be involved in the theft of a car at a premises in Section 33 here on Tuesday (March 24). Read full story

articles.title: Perlis' Timah Tasoh Dam water reserves expected to last 81 days
articles.summary: KANGAR: Water reserves at Timah Tasoh Dam in Beseri, near Padang Besar, are expected to last another 81 days if there is no rainfall and the hot weather persists in Perlis. Read full story

articles.title: Diesel price unchanged in Sabah, Sarawak, purchase limits apply
articles.summary: PETALING JAYA: Sabah and Sarawak will continue to enjoy subsidised diesel at RM2.15 per litre but the amount for each purchase will be capped, says Datuk Seri Anwar Ibrahim. Read full story
